_comment: Minimal RCCL JSON for cvs/tests/rccl/install_rccl_test.py only. Adjust paths for your cluster shared storage and ROCm layout.

rccl._comment_rccl_tests_dir: Where sparse checkout is built and *_perf symlinks are created (must be visible on all nodes if shared filesystem).
rccl._comment_rocm_path_var: ROCm root for hipcc/rocm_agent_enumerator and UCX --with-rocm. install.sh --rocm_home.
rccl._comment_rccl_path_var: RCCL install prefix for install.sh --rccl_home. Often same as rocm_path_var when RCCL is under ROCm.
rccl._comment_mpi_path_var: Open MPI prefix (directory containing bin/mpirun). Required for multi-node runs (num_nodes>1). If mpirun is missing here, UCX/OpenMPI are built into this path. Single-node: may be omitted.
rccl._comment_ucx_version: Used only when MPI is auto-installed (multi-node and mpirun missing at mpi_path_var).
rccl._comment_ompi_version: Used only when MPI is auto-installed.
